trusted_baseline.commit_semantics: Bootstrap commit for the previously empty HELIX30000 repository; live GitHub state determines the current head.

workstreams.write_owner: HELIX — Governed Agent Engineering / Coordination and Reality Control conversation
workstreams.objective: Create a machine-readable conversation-role registry so visible agent identities, repository ownership, review authority, and lifecycle claims can be reconciled without relying on chat titles or memory.

capability_boundary.repository_writes: declared permitted paths in anthonyedgar30000/HELIX30000 only

verification_criteria: the registry validates with the standard-library validator
no repository branch has more than one confirmed write owner
review-only, unresolved, handed-off, backlog, archive, and reference roles cannot claim repository-write authority
lifecycle claims are monotonic from proposed through operationally verified
the PR diff remains inside the declared permitted paths
CI uses no secrets, cloud credentials, external APIs, or mutation capabilities
workstreams.next_gate: Open a draft pull request, obtain exact-head CI, and request an independent coordination review. Do not merge or treat prescribed chat titles as automatically applied.

authority_boundary.service_tracer: read-only evidence; PR #27 remains owned by the ServiceTracer Azure Operations conversation
authority_boundary.protocol_kernel: read-only evidence; PR #4 remains owned by the Protocol Kernel and Agent Interoperability conversation
authority_boundary.contextos: read-only evidence; PR #13 has no repository-native active-work ownership record and remains unresolved
